name: discord-cli
description: Discord in your terminal — local-first sync, search, export, and analytics via SQLite.

commands.name: auth
commands.description: Extract and store token from browser session

use_cases: Search Discord conversations by keyword and channel
Analyze messaging activity and timeline patterns
Export chat history for archival or reporting
agent_metadata.example_workflow: discord dc sync-all -n 200 && discord search 'bug report' --json
